overview.description: The Brookstone Opportunities ETF (BAMO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that seeks to provide total return by investing in stocks, bonds, and cash and cash equivalents. The fund may be all in or all out stocks depending on market conditions. BAMO was launched on Sep 28, 2023 and is issued by Brookstone.
